subnetArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the subnet

vpcId.description: The ID of the VPC the subnet is in

state.description: The current state of the subnet

cidrBlock.description: The IPv4 CIDR block assigned to the subnet

availabilityZone.description: The Availability Zone of the subnet

availabilityZoneId.description: The AZ ID of the subnet

availableIpAddressCount.description: The number of unused private IPv4 addresses in the subnet

defaultForAz.description: Indicates whether this is the default subnet for the Availability Zone

mapPublicIpOnLaunch.description: Indicates whether instances launched in this subnet receive a public IPv4 address

ownerId.description: The ID of the AWS account that owns the subnet

tags.description: Any tags assigned to the subnet
